---
name: Feature Request
about: Got a great idea? We're listening. Got a terrible idea? We're still listening, but we'll be honest.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The Problem You're Solving

<!-- What's the pain point? What's frustrating you right now? Context helps us understand if this is worth building. -->

## Your Proposed Solution

<!-- What do you want us to build? Be specific. "Make it better" is not a feature request. -->

## Alternatives You've Considered

<!-- Other ways to solve this? Why didn't those work for you? -->

## Who Benefits From This?

- [ ] Creators launching collections
- [ ] Collectors browsing/buying
- [ ] Platform admins
- [ ] Developers working on this codebase
- [ ] Everyone (the dream)

## Priority (Your Opinion, Not a Guarantee)

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] I cannot function without this (bold claim, but okay)

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, examples from other platforms, references — anything that helps us visualize this. -->
